steps.title: Center orthoclase's number
steps.content: The goal is to emphasize orthoclase's Mohs scale number. The relevant notes say orthoclase has a number of 6, between fluorite at 4 and corundum at 9.

steps.title: Reject off-focus choices
steps.content: Choice A compares corundum and fluorite without orthoclase. Choice C describes ordering minerals but omits orthoclase's number. Choice D centers on corundum. The answer is B.
